name: Inevitability of Death

abilities.name: A Line of Graves
abilities.text: After this model kills a non-peon enemy model, this model gains a Death token.

abilities.name: Font of the Everlasting
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may remove a Death token from itself to heal 2.

actions.name: Dredge Up
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a friendly Lamp marker within range. This model may drain a (t).
actions.effects: This model declares a /// action drawing range and LoS from the target. If this model drained a (t), the generated action receives a (crow) and a suit of this model's choice.

extraction_notes: Death token mentioned in abilities but no explicit token definition provided on this card
